# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

_format_version: "3.0"

services:
  - name: my-service
    url: http://example.com/api

routes:
  - service: my-service
    paths:
      - /api

plugins:
  # Global CORS plugin configuration
  - name: cors
    config:
      origins: "http://webapp1.com, http://webapp2.com"
      methods: "GET, POST, PUT, DELETE"
      headers: "Authorization, Content-Type"
      max_age: 3600

  # Service-level authentication plugin configuration
  - name: key-auth
    service: my-service
    config:
      key_names: apikey
      hide_credentials: true

  # Route-level rate limiting plugin configuration
  - name: rate-limiting
    route: my-service
    config:
      minute: 50
      hour: 1000
      policy: local
